Uses of Class
com.onlinepayments.domain.SubMerchant

  • Packages that use SubMerchant 
    Package Description
    com.onlinepayments.domain  

    • Uses of SubMerchant in com.onlinepayments.domain

      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain that return SubMerchant 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SubMerchant CardPaymentMethodSpecificInputBase.getSubMerchant()
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
      SubMerchant CardPaymentMethodSpecificInput.getSubMerchant()
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
      SubMerchant SubMerchant.withAddress(Address value)
      Object containing billing address details.
      SubMerchant SubMerchant.withCompanyIdentificationNumber(String value)
      Business Establishment Directory Identification System
      SubMerchant SubMerchant.withCompanyName(String value)
      Name of the sales establishment requesting the transaction.
      SubMerchant SubMerchant.withMerchantCategoryCode(String value)
      MCC is a four-digit number that classifies the type of goods or services a business offers.
      SubMerchant SubMerchant.withMerchantId(String value)
      Merchant Identifier is a value defined by the acquirer.
      Methods in com.onlinepayments.domain with parameters of type SubMerchant 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void CardPaymentMethodSpecificInputBase.setSubMerchant(SubMerchant value)
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
      void CardPaymentMethodSpecificInput.setSubMerchant(SubMerchant value)
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
      CardPaymentMethodSpecificInputBase CardPaymentMethodSpecificInputBase.withSubMerchant(SubMerchant value)
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
      CardPaymentMethodSpecificInput CardPaymentMethodSpecificInput.withSubMerchant(SubMerchant value)
      When a company decides to operate as a payment facilitator, it obtains a payment facilitator account from an acquirer and aggregates payment transactions for its merchant portfolio through that account.
